questionHtml: state and explain the net magnetic force acting on it due to the currents in PQ and TU.
markschemeHtml:
The magnetic fields «due to currents in PQ and TU» are in opposite directions
OR
There are two «repulsive» forces in opposite directions ✓

Net force is zero ✓
